last_session_summary: Blog module: schema + admin CRUD + public pages + TipTap editor + Unsplash picker. Editorial redesign with fluid clamp typography (40-72px hero), eyebrow kicker pattern, 21:9 cinematic cover, quiet-luxury card restyle. +89 custom classes in new src/styles/blog.css (approved). Overrides still 0. Swapped isomorphic-dompurify → sanitize-html to fix jsdom ESM issue under Next 16 Turbopack. Build green, 79/79 pages.
notes: Blog module added 2026-04-11 (src/styles/blog.css, +89 classes, approved: no DS equivalent for blog layout, TipTap editor chrome, Unsplash picker). Hero frosted-glass overrides still in .vip-hero-search (photo backdrop, documented). Utility soup widespread (60+ instances) — post-QUARANTINE candidate ds-page-title. Blog pages use fluid clamp() typography scale and editorial layout patterns; if pattern recurs in other consumers, candidate ds-hero-title + ds-eyebrow tokens for DS core.
